itinerary.title: Leh to Manali: Himalayan Odyssey Across Divides
itinerary.description: This combined tour takes you to some of the most amazing natural and cultural attractions of Ladakh. Visit Nubra valley with Bactrian camels, then head to the pristine Pangong lake. On the return to Leh, visit the top attractions of the Indus valley.
highlights: Khardung La pass (5,602m) - world's highest motorable road
Nubra valley - 'valley of flowers' with Diskit Monastery and 32m Maitreya Buddha statue
Hunder sand dunes - ATV ride through stunning desert terrain
Pangong lake - pristine blue waters at 4,250m
Tso Moriri - one of India's highest alpine lakes via Horla and Kaksang La Passes
Suraj Tal - pristine high altitude lake reflecting mountain peaks
Bharalacha Pass (4,890m) - gateway between Ladakh and Himachal Pradesh
Solang Valley - panoramic views of snow-capped Himalayas
Sham Valley - Sangam, Magnetic Hill, Gurudwara Pathar Sahib, SECMOL (3 Idiots location)

overviewSections.title: Day 1: Arrival in Leh | Leisure Time
overviewSections.shortDescription: Welcome to Leh! Upon arrival at the airport, get transferred to your hotel and complete check-in. Spend your day at leisure to acclimatize to the high altitude. Visit the magnificent Leh Palace, a 17th-century royal residence that offers stunning panoramic views of the city and surrounding Himalayan peaks. Alternatively, head to Shanti Stupa, a serene white-domed Buddhist stupa for breathtaking vistas of Leh and the majestic mountains. Explore the vibrant Leh Market, where you can browse authentic Tibetan handicrafts, traditional souvenirs, and enjoy local cafés. Return to your hotel in the evening for rest and acclimatization.

overviewSections.title: Day 2: Sham Valley Day Tour | The Mysterious Paths of Ladakh
overviewSections.shortDescription: Begin your Sham Valley adventure with a scenic drive to Sangam, where the mystical Zanskar and Indus rivers meet. Experience the famous Magnetic Hill phenomenon, where vehicles appear to move uphill on their own due to the unique optical illusion created by the landscape. Visit the sacred Gurudwara Pathar Sahib, a stunning white-marble Sikh shrine set against rocky cliffs. Explore the SECMOL campus, the actual filming location from the blockbuster movie '3 Idiots'. Conclude your day at the Hall of Fame War Memorial, honoring Indian soldiers. For adventure enthusiasts, enjoy optional thrilling White Water Rafting at Sangam before returning to your hotel for an overnight stay.

overviewSections.title: Day 3: Transfer from Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung La Pass | Gateway to Silk Route
overviewSections.shortDescription: After checkout, embark on a spectacular journey towards the cold deserts of Nubra Valley through the legendary Khardung La Pass (5,602m), the world's highest motorable road. Stop at the iconic Rinchen Cafe to enjoy steaming hot maggi with unparalleled mountain views. Visit the ancient Diskit Monastery, home to the magnificent 32-meter tall golden statue of Maitreya Buddha overlooking the valley. Experience the unique landscape of Hunder Sand Dunes with the option to enjoy an adventurous ATV ride (extra cost) through the striking desert terrain. Arrive at your campsite in Nubra Valley surrounded by breathtaking mountain scenery for an overnight stay.

overviewSections.title: Day 4: Transfer from Nubra Valley to Pangong Tso | Camping at the Pangong Lake
overviewSections.shortDescription: Check-out from your Nubra campsite and begin your scenic journey towards the world-famous Pangong Tso (Pangong Lake). The drive offers spectacular views of dramatic Ladakh peaks and pristine mountain terrain. Pass through charming Shyok Village nestled along the banks of the Shyok River, experiencing local culture and mountain hospitality. Upon arrival at Pangong Lake (4,250m), one of the world's highest saltwater lakes, settle into your lakeside campsite. Take a leisurely stroll along the pristine shores and witness the mesmerizing, ever-changing hues of the crystalline blue waters reflecting the majestic snow-capped Himalayas. Experience the tranquility and natural beauty of this iconic destination.

overviewSections.title: Day 5: Pangong Tso to Tso Moriri via Horla and Kaksang la passes | Camping at the Tso Moriri
overviewSections.shortDescription: Check-out from your campsite at Pangong Tso and begin your adventurous journey towards the pristine Tso Moriri lake. Your route will take you through the breathtaking Horla Pass and the majestic Kaksang La Pass, offering spectacular panoramic views of the high Himalayan peaks and remote mountain terrain. The drive is an exhilarating experience as you traverse through some of Ladakh's most untouched and beautiful landscapes. Upon arrival at Tso Moriri, one of the highest lakes in India, settle into your campsite and witness the stunning natural beauty of this pristine alpine lake surrounded by snow-capped mountains. Enjoy the serene atmosphere and the ever-changing colors of the lake as the sun sets over the Himalayas.

overviewSections.title: Day 6: Transfer from Tso Moriri to Jispa | Suraj Tal, Bharalacha pass, Lachungla, Moorie Plains
overviewSections.shortDescription: Check-out from your campsite at Tso Moriri and embark on an unforgettable drive towards Jispa through some of Ladakh and Himachal Pradesh's most remote and pristine landscapes. Visit the breathtaking Suraj Tal, one of the highest lakes in the region, offering stunning reflections of surrounding peaks. Cross the majestic Bharalacha Pass at 4,890m with panoramic views of towering mountains and deep valleys. Pass through the beautiful Lachungla landscape and the untouched Moorie Plains, where you'll witness traditional settlements and pristine natural beauty. Arrive in Jispa in the evening and settle into your cozy guesthouse for an overnight stay.

overviewSections.title: Day 7: Departure | Transfer from Jispa to Manali | On the way sight seeing - Solang Valley, Sissu, Khelong
overviewSections.shortDescription: Check-out from Jispa and begin your scenic drive towards Manali through the breathtaking Himalayas. Witness the stunning landscapes as you pass through charming villages like Sissu and Khelong, known for their traditional Himachali architecture. Stop at the picturesque Solang Valley for panoramic views of snow-capped peaks. Arrive in Manali around noon and settle into your hotel. Spend your afternoon exploring Manali's famous Mall Road with shops and cafés. In the evening, transfer to Manali Bus Station for your overnight Volvo journey to Delhi, marking the end of your unforgettable Ladakh adventure.

detailedItinerary.route: Pangong Lake - Horla Pass - Kaksang La - Tso Moriri
detailedItinerary.description: Check-out from your campsite at Pangong Tso and begin your adventurous journey towards the pristine Tso Moriri lake. Your route will take you through the breathtaking Horla Pass and the majestic Kaksang La Pass, offering spectacular panoramic views of the high Himalayan peaks and remote mountain terrain. The drive is an exhilarating experience as you traverse through some of Ladakh's most untouched and beautiful landscapes. Upon arrival at Tso Moriri, one of the highest lakes in India, settle into your campsite and witness the stunning natural beauty of this pristine alpine lake surrounded by snow-capped mountains. activities: Cross Horla Pass with panoramic views
Scenic drive through remote mountain terrain
Reach Tso Moriri (one of India's highest lakes)

detailedItinerary.title: Transfer from Tso Moriri to Jispa | Suraj Tal, Bharalacha Pass, Lachungla, Moorie Plains
detailedItinerary.route: Tso Moriri - Suraj Tal - Bharalacha Pass - Jispa
detailedItinerary.description: Check-out from your campsite at Tso Moriri and begin your journey towards Jispa. Your drive will take you through some of the most scenic and remote regions of Ladakh and Himachal Pradesh. Cross the stunning Bharalacha Pass at 4,890m, offering breathtaking views of the surrounding peaks and valleys. Visit the pristine Suraj Tal (Surya Tal), one of the highest lakes in the region. Pass through the beautiful Moorie Plains with their untouched natural beauty and traditional settlements. Arrive in Jispa in the evening and settle into your guesthouse for an overnight stay.
activities: Visit Suraj Tal (pristine high altitude lake)

detailedItinerary.title: Departure | Transfer from Jispa to Manali | On the way sight seeing - Solang Valley, Sissu, Khelong
detailedItinerary.route: Jispa - Sissu - Khelong - Solang Valley - Manali
detailedItinerary.description: Check-out from your guesthouse and begin your scenic drive towards Manali. Drive through the stunning landscapes of the Himalayas, passing through charming villages like Sissu and Khelong with their traditional Himachali architecture and local culture. Make a stop at the breathtaking Solang Valley, famous for its adventure activities and panoramic views of snow-capped peaks. Enjoy the lush green meadows and mountain vistas before arriving in Manali around noon. Check into your hotel and spend your afternoon exploring Mall Road, with its bustling shops, cafés, and local handicraft stores. In the evening, transfer to Manali Bus Station for your overnight Volvo journey to Delhi, marking the end of your incredible Ladakh adventure.
activities: Stop at Solang Valley for views and photos
